hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: These terms of service govern the use of SustainSoft's technology consulting services. By hiring our services, you accept these terms in their entirety.

sections.title: 1. Scope
sections.content: These Terms of Service apply to all technology consulting services provided by SustainSoft to non-profit organizations, foundations, and social sector entities. By hiring our services, the client accepts these terms and conditions in their entirety.

sections.title: 2. Services provided
sections.intro: SustainSoft offers the following technology consulting services:

items.text: **Technology diagnosis:** Evaluation of existing digital infrastructure and identification of improvement opportunities.
**Software development:** Design and construction of custom technology solutions for social organizations.
**Process automation:** Implementation of automated tools and workflows.
**Training and support:** Staff training and ongoing technical support.

sections.title: 3. Responsibilities
sections.intro: Both SustainSoft and the client have specific responsibilities during the collaboration:

cards.title: Our part
cards.desc: Compliance with agreed deadlines, quality of delivered code, and technical support as stipulated in the contract.

cards.title: Client
cards.desc: Provide accurate and timely information, access to necessary systems, and designation of a contact person.

cards.title: Communication
cards.desc: Maintain open communication channels and respond to information requests within reasonable timeframes.

cards.title: Payments
cards.desc: Make payments according to the terms and schedule established in the service contract.

sections.title: 4. Confidentiality
sections.intro: Protecting your information is our priority:

steps.title: Confidentiality agreements
steps.desc: All our staff sign strict confidentiality agreements before accessing client information.

steps.title: Data handling
steps.desc: Client data is processed solely for the specific purposes of the project and never shared with third parties without consent.

steps.title: Intellectual property
steps.desc: The client retains all intellectual property rights over their data and any specific work developed for their organization.

contact.title: 5. Limitations and modifications
contact.subtitle: SustainSoft reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will take effect once published on our website. If you have questions about these terms, please contact us.
